---
title: "Demo Report"
author:
  - name: Franz Zieris
    email: franz.zieris@bth.se
date: 2026-04-02
format:
  html: default
  pdf:
    number-sections: true
    documentclass: scrartcl
    sansfont: "Arial"
    mainfont: "Times New Roman"
    colorlinks: true
execute: 
  echo: false
---

```{r}
#| label: load-libraries
#| message: false
library(targets)
source("R/plot.R")
```

## Work Hours

```{r}
#| label: fig-java-whours
#| fig-cap: Work time spent on Java programs
#| warning: false
tar_read(data) |>
    plot_work_hours("Java")
```
